description_long: This is a compact, modern two-seater sofa upholstered in a vibrant teal fabric. The sofa features two large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion, both of which appear plush and inviting. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's boxy silhouette. The backrest is slightly lower than the armrests and is formed by the two back cushions, giving the sofa a clean, minimalist look. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. The base of the sofa is fully enclosed, with no visible legs, contributing to its contemporary and streamlined appearance.
description: A modern teal two-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, two large back cushions, and a smooth, solid fabric finish. The design is boxy and minimalist, with an enclosed base and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large back cushions, a single seat cushion, and straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sofa's boxy profile, medium-height armrest, and the thickness of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous back and the enclosed base, with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and a single continuous seat cushion, all uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at medium height, integrated into the sofa's boxy frame with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed, giving the appearance of a solid block resting on the floor.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight backrest formed by two large, loose cushions; continuous and unadorned.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid teal color with a smooth, matte fabric finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
